pr.title: Non-record: Competitive Stack + Phonetic Tokenization Exploration (val_bpb=1.2055, 4xH100)

output.summary: Combines int6 STE QAT, BigramHash, SmearGate, OrthoInit, and MLP×3 width with IPA tokenization research to match upto-date compression stacks.
techniques: Int6 STE QAT with OrthoInit scaling and widened MLP
BigramHash embeddings plus SmearGate gating for local context
IPA-BPE tokenization tested alongside sliding-window evaluation
